summary: Public metrics such as followers, stars, forks, comments, impressions, or pull requests may fail to reveal actual reliance, copying, cloning, private use, downstream influence, or legitimacy value transfer.
why_it_matters_to_CAM: Public legitimacy or influence may be under-observed if visible metrics fail to capture reliance, copying, cloning, private use, downstream influence, or value transfer.
